widgets_values:
- Sbugraph Guide: [subgraph](https://docs.comfy.org/interface/features/subgraph) 
- [xgen-universe/Capybara](https://huggingface.co/xgen-universe/Capybara)
## Model Links (for Local Users)

**diffusion_models**

- [capybara_v0.1.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/HunyuanVideo_1.5_repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/capybara_v0.1.safetensors)

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_2.5_vl_7b.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/HunyuanImage_2.1_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_2.5_vl_7b.safetensors)
- [byt5_small_glyphxl_fp16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/HunyuanVideo_1.5_repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/byt5_small_glyphxl_fp16.safetensors)

**vae**

- [hunyuanvideo15_vae_fp16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/HunyuanVideo_1.5_repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/vae/hunyuanvideo15_vae_fp16.safetensors)

**clip_vision**

- [sigclip_vision_patch14_384.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/HunyuanVideo_1.5_repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/clip_vision/sigclip_vision_patch14_384.safetensors)


## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │   └── capybara_v0.1.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │   ├── qwen_2.5_vl_7b.safetensors
│   │   └── byt5_small_glyphxl_fp16.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 vae/
│   │   └── hunyuanvideo15_vae_fp16.safetensors
│   └── 📂 clip_vision/
│       └── sigclip_vision_patch14_384.safetensors
```

## Report Issue

Note: Please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/zh-CN/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud ship stable builds; nightly-supported models may not be included yet, please wait for the next stable release.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

nodes.title: Sampler Setting
widgets_values:
| Parameter | Inference Script (Default) | ComfyUI (Default) |
 |-----------|---------------------------|-------------------|
 | **Steps** | 50 | 20 |
 | **CFG** | 4.0 | 6.0 |
> 💡 **Tip:** For better quality results, consider using **50 steps** instead of the default 20  steps in ComfyUI.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Negative Prompt)
widgets_values: blurry, low quality, distorted, ugly, watermark, text

You are the top movie director; I need some inspiration to create stunning images using AI Video.
I need the text prompt from your inspiration idea with the following structure: Subject+Scene+Action

Based on the image I attached, you need to identify which subject in the image serves as the starting frame for a 5-second video clip, using a single shot.  Then you are going to create the action for the subject(s).
Split at matching sigma to the noise scale
